tokenColors.name: Comment - C# XML doc (triple-slash, slightly brighter)
Preprocessor - defined() operator (prevent function-call color override)
Preprocessor - Macro parameters (neutral color for brackets/params)
Keyword - Control flow (C++, C, C#, Python, Rust)
Keyword - Control flow Lua (red, matches general keyword color)
C/C++ array brackets [] — reset to neutral
Keyword - Operator words (new, delete, sizeof, casts)
Keyword - C++ word-like operators (alignas, noexcept, requires, co_await, etc.)
Keyword - Logical word operators (and, or, not, in, is)
Keyword - operator keyword at overload / conversion declaration site
Type - Used / Referenced (STL, support types, traits, interfaces)
Variable - Member / Field (TextMate fallback — C++, C struct, C#, Python, Lua, Rust)
Constant - Numeric literals (all bases: decimal, hex, octal, binary, float)
Constant - Numeric suffixes and UDL (u, L, f, ULL, 0x prefix, etc.)
Constant - Language keywords (true, false, null, nullptr, nil, None)
Constant - User-defined named constants (const, constexpr, readonly)
Constant - Escape sequences and format placeholders (\n, %d, {0})
Operator - Arithmetic, assignment, comparison, logical, bitwise
Operator - Pointer, member access, address (quieter / gray)
Rust - Macro punctuation (the ! and surrounding braces)
Rust - where / impl / dyn in trait bounds
Generic - Rust angle brackets for generics <T>
